problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting may resolve Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
